<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event; /** * Triggered whenever a request is fully processed. * * @author Benjamin Eberlei <kontakt@beberlei.de> */ final class FinishRequestEvent extends KernelEvent { }
